title: Heavy Bleeding After Delivery - Postpartum Hemorrhage
chief_complaint: 30-year-old G1P1 30 minutes after vaginal delivery with heavy vaginal bleeding (estimated 800mL), boggy uterus, and hypotension. Delivered 4.2kg baby after prolonged labor.

physical_exam.abdomen: Boggy, soft uterus above umbilicus, heavy vaginal bleeding with clots

key_learning_points: Fundal massage + uterotonics (oxytocin, methergine, hemabate, misoprostol)
Bakri balloon or surgical if medical fails

patient_responses.labor: Labor was 18 hours, she was exhausted

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! PPH from uterine atony.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is PPH from atony. The boggy uterus confirms it.
feedback.attending_note: PPH: Fundal massage + oxytocin 10 IU IM + oxytocin infusion 40 IU in 500mL. If fails: methergine 0.2mg IM (if no HTN), hemabate 250mcg IM (if no asthma), misoprostol 800mcg PR. Bakri balloon if medical fails. Activate MTP if >1500mL.
